scripts.build:ext: tsc --project tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build --config vite.ext.config.ts && node ./scripts/export-ext.mjs
scripts.lint: biome check src scripts vite.config.ts vite.ext.config.ts
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src scripts vite.config.ts vite.ext.config.ts
scripts.format: biome format --write src scripts vite.config.ts vite.ext.config.ts
